title: Molecular Epidemiology of Oropouche Virus, Ceará State, Brazil, 2024.
author_string: de Lima, Shirlene T S, Hua, Xinyi, Claro, Ingra M, Filho, Carlos Garcia, Simões Mello, Leda M et al.
abstract: During May-December 2024, we detected Oropouche virus (OROV) in 13.9% (263/1,890) of febrile patients in Ceará state, Brazil. Genomic sequencing revealed those cases were caused by a novel OROV reassortant previously identified in the Amazon region. Our data show the introduction and establishment of OROV transmission in Ceará, northeastern Brazil.
